column1: # /Data Sort with Primary + Secondary + Extra keys all in play.
# Tiebreak chain: when Primary keys are equal, fall through to
# Secondary; when Secondary keys are also equal, fall through to
# Extra. Each key has its own Asc/Desc choice.
# Sort by A asc, then B asc, then C desc — the tiebreaker chain
# kicks in only on the rows where A AND B are equal.
# Expected order after sort by A asc, B asc, C desc:
#   row 2: east, small, 9   (tie on A=east+B=small → C=9 first by C desc)
